since_last: 27% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.34%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.36% · BTC -1.75% · Gold -2.26% · Nasdaq100 -2.03%. 27% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.34%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.34%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.55%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +6.62%, AVAV +5.75%, SKHY +4.24%, MU +3.18%, FIX +2.91%. Laggards: TSLA -13.55%, CRNC -8.58%, GOOGL -6.43%, UPST -5.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.05% at $114.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
